disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous spontaneous bleeding from the gums since dinner with no dental trauma, filling the mouth with blood
trigger_question_examples: What made you get in touch tonight?
Where is the bleeding coming from and did anything cause it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My gums just started bleeding on their own after dinner and haven't stopped — my mouth keeps filling up with blood and I never hurt them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound weakness with inability to stand and light-headedness on standing (orthostatic)
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
Can you stand or walk at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely drained — I can't get up out of the chair, and when I try I go dizzy and feel like I'll pass out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Four months of progressive fatigue completely refractory to GP-prescribed oral iron and vitamin B12
trigger_question_examples: How long have you been feeling tired, and has anything helped?
Have you been treated for anaemia before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been getting more and more worn out for about four months now, and the iron and vitamin B12 my GP gave me haven't made the slightest difference.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New widespread pinpoint red spots (petechiae) on the ankles noticed today
trigger_question_examples: Have you or your spouse noticed any rash or tiny red spots on your skin?
Any new marks on your legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My spouse noticed a lot of new tiny red pinpoint spots on my ankles today that weren't there before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New unexplained large bruises (ecchymoses) on the forearms
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any easy or unexplained bruising?
Any big bruises you don't remember causing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now you mention it, I've got several big bruises on my forearms and I have no idea how I got them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A severe unexplained chest infection last month (recent recurrent/serious infection)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any infections recently?
Any chest infections or illnesses in the last month or two?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a really bad chest infection last month that came out of nowhere, though I've got over it now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever this evening, and no blood-thinning medication or NSAID use (pertinent negatives)
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any blood thinners or anti-inflammatory painkillers?
Have you had a temperature or fever tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't take any blood thinners or anti-inflammatory tablets, and I checked — I haven't got a temperature.
